_comment: Retailer config for LUBA 2 AWD 3000X tracker. shopify=true means use /products.json API.

retailers.name: Robot Mowers Australia
retailers.notes: Has bundles (Garage & Mow Kit, Ultimate Bundle)

retailers.name: Robotic Mowing
retailers.notes: Currently lists older non-X variants only — keep checking

retailers.name: Ople Appliance
retailers.notes: Reseller; same SKU appears on Kogan, Mattblatt, Woolworths Marketplace (likely same price)

retailers.name: LUBA.com.au (DISABLED — importer DNS broken at Cloudflare since Jan 2026)
retailers.notes: Removed 2026-04-29 per Jon: Mammotion AU (au.mammotion.com) is the manufacturer/official store and supersedes the importer for our purposes. Re-enable if luba.com.au DNS is ever restored.

retailers.name: Mammotion DM AU (DISABLED — CloudFront TLS broken)
retailers.notes: Removed 2026-04-29: their CloudFront edge returns TLS internal_error to every client. Mammotion AU (au.mammotion.com, the manufacturer's official store) is the canonical Mammotion source.

marketplaces.name: Amazon AU
marketplaces.notes: Anti-bot, may need Keepa API for history

marketplaces.name: eBay AU
marketplaces.notes: Aggregator listings, worth periodic check for grey-market deals

alertRules._useFloorReference: DISABLED — LUBA.com.au removed 2026-04-29. Mammotion AU (au.mammotion.com) is the official manufacturer store; if it goes on sale, that IS the floor.
